evidence.q1: 1. Roles and Scope ... 15. Term and Transition Assistance (sections numbered sequentially 1–15; no cross-references to fail)
evidence.q2: 2. Definitions '“Personal Data” means ... “Processing” means ... “Personal Data Breach” means ...'; used consistently thereafter
evidence.q3: No vague time/quantity phrasing; e.g., 'within 10 business days' in Sect. 8
evidence.q4: No archaic or out-of-register diction; e.g., 'Vendor will maintain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards...'
evidence.q5: No internally contradictory or grammatically broken sentences; e.g., 'Vendor will send an initial written alert about a Personal Data Breach within 10 business days after discovering it only if forensic review confirms outbound extraction.'
evidence.q6: Consistent register throughout; opening uses 'This Data Processing Addendum ... supplements ...' and Section 15 uses 'For up to 30 days after termination, Vendor will provide ...' – same modern contractual style
